description: Create @quant/data-plane package with BaseRepository<T>, outbox pattern, read-replica routing, field encryption, audit log, soft delete, and optimistic locking. Add required Prisma models (OutboxEvent, AuditLog, EncryptionKey) to the database schema.
steps: Create packages/data-plane/package.json with name @quant/data-plane, dependencies on @prisma/client, ioredis, zod, @quant/common, @quant/database, crypto (node built-in). Dev deps: vitest, @types/node, typescript.
Create packages/data-plane/tsconfig.json extending ../../tsconfig.json with outDir dist, rootDir src, composite true.
Create packages/data-plane/vitest.config.ts with defineConfig test globals true environment node.
Create packages/data-plane/src/index.ts barrel exporting all modules.

Create packages/data-plane/src/replica-router.ts: ReplicaRouter class that accepts primary PrismaClient and replica PrismaClient, routes read operations (findMany, findFirst, findUnique, count, aggregate) to replica and write operations to primary. Include a forceWrite() method to force reads to primary for read-after-write consistency.

Create packages/data-plane/src/outbox.ts: OutboxPublisher class that writes OutboxEvent records within the same transaction as the main write. Fields: id, aggregateType, aggregateId, eventType, payload (Json), createdAt, publishedAt (nullable). Include a markPublished method.

Create packages/data-plane/src/field-encryption.ts: FieldEncryption class using AES-256-GCM (crypto.createCipheriv/createDecipheriv). Methods: encrypt(plaintext, key) -> {ciphertext, iv, authTag}, decrypt(ciphertext, iv, authTag, key) -> plaintext, rotateKey(data, oldKey, newKey). Key derived from env ENCRYPTION_MASTER_KEY. Use crypto.randomBytes for IV generation.

Create packages/data-plane/src/audit-log.ts: AuditLogger class that writes AuditLog records. Methods: log(actorId, action, resourceType, resourceId, diff, metadata). diff is a JSON object showing before/after. metadata includes ipAddress, userAgent.

Create packages/data-plane/src/soft-delete.ts: SoftDelete mixin/utility providing softDelete(id) sets deletedAt=now(), restore(id) sets deletedAt=null, findActive() filters where deletedAt is null, findDeleted() filters where deletedAt is not null.

Create packages/data-plane/src/optimistic-locking.ts: OptimisticLock utility that checks version field on update, throws ConflictError if version mismatch. Method: updateWithLock(id, expectedVersion, data) increments version atomically.

Create packages/data-plane/src/base-repository.ts: Generic BaseRepository<T> class combining all above features. Constructor accepts config with modelName, encryptedFields (array of field names), enableAudit boolean, enableSoftDelete boolean. Methods: findById, findMany, create, update, delete. Create/update automatically: encrypt specified fields, write outbox event, write audit log, check optimistic lock, route to replica/primary.

Add Prisma models to packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma: OutboxEvent (id, aggregateType, aggregateId, eventType, payload Json, createdAt, publishedAt nullable), AuditLog (id, actorId, action, resourceType, resourceId, diff Json, ipAddress, userAgent, createdAt), EncryptionKey (id, userId, encryptedKey, algorithm default 'AES-256-GCM', rotatedAt, createdAt). Add proper indexes.
Create packages/data-plane/__tests__/field-encryption.test.ts testing encrypt/decrypt round-trip, key rotation, invalid key handling.
Create packages/data-plane/__tests__/optimistic-locking.test.ts testing version check pass/fail.
Create packages/data-plane/__tests__/outbox.test.ts testing event creation and markPublished.
Create packages/data-plane/__tests__/replica-router.test.ts testing read/write routing.
Create packages/data-plane/__tests__/audit-log.test.ts testing log creation.
Create packages/data-plane/__tests__/base-repository.test.ts testing integrated behavior with mocked prisma.
Run pnpm install to register new workspace package.
Run pnpm --filter @quant/data-plane typecheck to verify compilation.
Run pnpm --filter @quant/data-plane test to verify tests pass.
Commit: feat(data-plane): add @quant/data-plane package with BaseRepository, outbox, replica routing, field encryption, audit log, soft delete, optimistic locking
acceptance_criteria: All source files compile without errors: pnpm --filter @quant/data-plane typecheck passes
All tests pass: pnpm --filter @quant/data-plane test passes
BaseRepository<T> class supports: read-replica routing, outbox pattern, audit logging, field encryption (AES-256-GCM), soft delete, optimistic locking
Prisma schema includes OutboxEvent, AuditLog, EncryptionKey models
No 'any' types, no @ts-ignore, all security uses crypto module
findings: All 32 tests pass, typecheck passes. hkdfSync returns ArrayBuffer so must wrap with Buffer.from(). Commit message header must be <= 100 chars. Pre-existing typecheck failures in @quant/database remain (need prisma generate with DB). Prettier reformats via lint-staged on commit.
